title: Senior Project Manager - Rail Infrastructure
description_raw:
Matchtech is recruiting a Senior Project Manager for a rail infrastructure contract. The role is based in Dubai supporting a regional rail expansion programme.

Key responsibilities:
- Drive programme delivery against baseline schedule using Primavera P6
- Manage the risk register and maintain a live RAID log
- Stakeholder management across client, contractor, and regulatory bodies
- Administer NEC4 ECC contracts with specialist rail subcontractors

Requirements:
- 10+ years rail project management
- APM PMQ or PRINCE2 Practitioner
- Previous international rail PM experience essential

Rate: £600–£680 per day (tax-free)
Duration: 18 months
Start: ASAP
